title: Immigration Services for Physicians — ELLIS PORTER
content:
## Physician Immigration Questions? Let’s Talk.
Whether you are a resident, fellow or staff physician, we can help you develop the right work visa strategy to support your medical career plans. Learn More ›
If you are a physician who is subject to the J-1 two-year home residency requirement, obtaining a J-1 waiver can be an essential, yet complicated, step required to take your career plans to the next level. We can evaluate your personal and professional situation and find a J-1 waiver strategy that meets your needs. Learn More ›
If you have decided to make the U.S. your permanent home, finding the right green card category is important.
Whatever green card pathway you are exploring, we have a team of experts available to help you develop the most advantageous strategy for your personal and professional goals. Learn More ›

## Meet our Healthcare Team
Kristi Crawford Marc Topoleski Marisa Ignash Mary Kate Church Sarah McElwaney
